expectations.text: The price/value element has the largest font-size in the card
expectations.evidence: .price-amount { font-size: 56px } — largest in the card; plan name is 30px, items are 15px

expectations.text: Uses at least two distinct font-weight levels to establish hierarchy
expectations.evidence: Font-weights 400, 600, 700 — three distinct levels used across name, price, features, CTA

expectations.text: CTA button is visually prominent (strong background color, not just outlined)
expectations.evidence: CTA button has solid hsl() background color — not an outline-only style
13 hsl() color values used throughout; only 2 hex values in file
